items.title: Supported implementation enhances injury prevention programme (Prep-to-Play) use in women and girls playing Australian Football: a pragmatic type III hybrid implementation-effectiveness stepped wedge cluster randomised trial
items.summary: A stepped wedge cluster RCT of 165 women's/girls' Australian Football teams (2481 players) found that supported implementation of the Prep-to-Play injury prevention program significantly increased program use and reduced injury incidence by 30%.
items.curatedReason: 澳大利亚这项 RCT 证实，通过“支持性实施”方法能显著提高青少年和成年女子澳式橄榄球运动员的伤害预防项目 Prep-to-Play 使用依从性，并将伤害发生率降低 30%。对于重视运动损伤预防的临床实践，这是提升项目有效性的重要途径。
items.titleZh: 支持性实施显著提升女子澳式橄榄球伤害预防项目 Prep-to-Play 的使用依从性及效果：一项分阶段整群随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项涵盖 2481 名女子澳式橄榄球运动员的整群随机对照试验显示，通过支持性实施（supported implementation），伤害预防项目 Prep-to-Play 的使用依从性显著提高，同时伤害发生率降低了 30%。
items.curatedReasonEn: This Australian RCT confirms that "supported implementation" significantly boosts adherence to the Prep-to-Play injury prevention program in youth and adult female Australian Football players, leading to a 30% reduction in injury incidence. For clinics prioritizing sports injury prevention, this highlights a critical pathway to enhance program effectiveness.

items.title: Effectiveness of Radial Extracorporeal Shockwave Therapy Versus Other Electrophysical Modalities on Pain and Functionality in Patients With Plantar Fasciitis: A Systematic Review and Meta-Analysis.
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis found radial extracorporeal shockwave therapy (rESWT) superior to other electrophysical modalities for pain and functionality in patients with plantar fasciitis.
items.curatedReason: 这项系统综述和 Meta 分析发现，径向体外冲击波疗法（rESWT）在减轻足底筋膜炎（PF）疼痛和改善功能方面优于其他电物理疗法。当你为 PF 患者选择理疗方案时，rESWT 应该作为优先考虑的非侵入性选项，特别是考虑到其“实用性和成本效益”。
items.titleZh: 径向体外冲击波疗法与其他电物理疗法对足底筋膜炎患者疼痛和功能影响的有效性：一项系统综述和 Meta 分析
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述和 Meta 分析发现，径向体外冲击波疗法（rESWT）在减轻足底筋膜炎患者疼痛和改善功能方面优于其他电物理疗法。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review and meta-analysis found radial extracorporeal shockwave therapy (rESWT) superior to other electrophysical modalities for reducing pain and improving function in plantar fasciitis (PF). When choosing physical therapy options for PF patients, rESWT should be a prioritized non-invasive choice, especially given its "practicality and cost-effectiveness."

items.title: Physiotherapists' perception of barriers and facilitators to the implementation of digital health interventions: a scoping review.
items.summary: A scoping review summarized physiotherapists' perceptions of barriers and facilitators to the implementation of digital health interventions, highlighting the slow adoption despite potential benefits.
items.curatedReason: 这项范围综述系统地总结了物理治疗师对数字健康干预（DHIs）实施障碍和促进因素的看法。它明确指出，尽管 DHIs 潜力巨大，但采用速度缓慢，你需要关注技术整合、培训、工作流程适应和患者接受度等关键因素，以有效推动远程康复和数字化实践。
items.titleZh: 物理治疗师对数字健康干预实施障碍和促进因素的看法：一项范围综述
items.summaryZh: 一项范围综述总结了物理治疗师对数字健康干预实施障碍和促进因素的看法，强调了尽管有潜在益处，但采用速度缓慢。
items.curatedReasonEn: This scoping review systematically summarizes physical therapists' perceptions of barriers and facilitators to digital health intervention (DHI) implementation. It clearly states that despite DHIs' immense potential, adoption is slow; you need to focus on key factors like technology integration, training, workflow adaptation, and patient acceptance to effectively drive telerehabilitation and digital practices.

items.title: Peripheral Nerve Field Stimulation in the Treatment of Persistent Low Back Pain: A Retrospective Study.
items.summary: A retrospective study assessed peripheral nerve field stimulation (PNFS) for persistent low back pain, showing long-term efficacy and reduced opioid use over a mean follow-up of 49.3 months.
items.curatedReason: 这项回顾性研究显示外周神经场刺激（PNFS）对顽固性慢性腰痛（CLBP）患者具有长期疗效，并减少了阿片类药物使用。对于传统治疗无效的 CLBP 患者，PNFS 提供了一个值得关注的非药物选择，但你需要注意这仍是回顾性数据，需更高质量研究验证。
items.titleZh: 外周神经场刺激治疗持续性腰痛：一项回顾性研究
items.summaryZh: 一项回顾性研究评估了外周神经场刺激（PNFS）治疗持续性腰痛的效果，结果显示平均 49.3 个月的随访期内，PNFS 具有长期疗效并能减少阿片类药物使用。
items.curatedReasonEn: This retrospective study shows Peripheral Nerve Field Stimulation (PNFS) offers long-term efficacy for intractable chronic low back pain (CLBP) and reduces opioid use. For CLBP patients unresponsive to traditional therapies, PNFS presents a notable non-pharmacological option, but be aware this is retrospective data; higher-quality studies are needed for validation.

items.title: Tennis leg: Diagnosis and management - A state-of-the-art review.
items.summary: This state-of-the-art review details the diagnosis and conservative management of "tennis leg" injuries, which commonly occur at the medial gastrocnemius-soleus junction.
items.curatedReason: 这篇综述提供了“网球腿”损伤诊断和保守治疗的最新洞察。了解其高发部位（内侧腓肠肌-比目鱼肌连接处）和主要诊断方法对你的临床实践至关重要。保守治疗仍是主流，提示你在急性期管理和康复训练中的核心作用。
items.titleZh: 网球腿：诊断与管理——最新综述
items.summaryZh: 这篇最新综述详细阐述了“网球腿”损伤的诊断和保守治疗，该损伤常发生于内侧腓肠肌-比目鱼肌连接处。
items.curatedReasonEn: This review offers current insights into the diagnosis and conservative management of 'tennis leg' injuries. Understanding its common site (medial gastrocnemius-soleus junction) and primary diagnostic methods is crucial for your clinical practice. Conservative management remains the mainstay, underscoring your central role in acute care and rehabilitation.

items.title: Cardiorespiratory Exercise Intensity Prescription in Cardiovascular Rehabilitation: Do Updated Guideline Recommendations Reflect Real Individual Effort Responses?
items.summary: A retrospective multicentre study of 2,554 individuals found that the updated AHA/AACVPR Scientific Statement's moderate-intensity exercise prescription based on %HRR was not accurately reflecting real individual effort responses compared to heart rate at ventilatory thresholds.
items.curatedReason: 这项多中心研究（2554 例患者）发现 AHA/AACVPR 关于心率储备百分比 (%HRR) 的中等强度运动处方在心血管康复中可能不够准确。这意味着你在为心血管疾病患者制定运动计划时，不应完全依赖 %HRR，而应结合心率在通气阈值（VT）的表现，进行更个体化的调整。
items.titleZh: 心血管康复中运动强度处方：更新指南建议是否反映了真实的个体努力反应？
items.summaryZh: 一项对 2554 名患者的回顾性多中心研究发现，与通气阈值心率相比，AHA/AACVPR 科学声明中基于心率储备百分比的更新中等强度运动处方未能准确反映真实的个体努力反应。
items.curatedReasonEn: This multicenter study (2554 patients) found AHA/AACVPR's %HRR-based moderate-intensity exercise prescription might be inaccurate in cardiovascular rehabilitation. This means you shouldn't solely rely on %HRR for cardiovascular patients' exercise plans; instead, integrate heart rate at ventilatory thresholds (VT) for more individualized adjustments.

items.title: Safety and Feasibility of an Asynchronous AI-Integrated Tele-Pulmonary Rehabilitation Application Among Patients with COPD.
items.summary: A study confirmed the safety and feasibility of an asynchronous AI-integrated tele-pulmonary rehabilitation application among COPD patients, highlighting its potential to improve access.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究证实了异步 AI 集成远程肺康复（TPR）应用对 COPD 患者的安全性和可行性。考虑到传统肺康复利用率有限，这为你提供了提升患者依从性和可及性的潜在新工具，尤其适用于那些因地理或时间限制无法参与线下康复的患者。
items.titleZh: 异步 AI 集成远程肺康复应用在 COPD 患者中的安全性和可行性
items.summaryZh: 一项研究证实了异步 AI 集成远程肺康复应用在 COPD 患者中的安全性和可行性，突显了其改善患者可及性的潜力。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study confirms the safety and feasibility of an asynchronous AI-integrated tele-pulmonary rehabilitation (TPR) application for COPD patients. Given the limited utilization of traditional pulmonary rehabilitation, this offers you a potential new tool to boost patient adherence and accessibility, particularly for those unable to attend in-person rehab due to geographic or time constraints.

items.title: Effects of foot-specific exercise with or without taping on navicular drop, foot posture, and plantar pressure: A randomized comparative trial.
items.summary: A randomized comparative trial of 34 young adults with flatfoot found that foot-specific exercise combined with taping was more effective than exercise alone in improving navicular drop, foot posture, and plantar pressure.
items.curatedReason: 这项随机对照试验发现，足部特定运动结合肌内效贴（taping）比单独运动在改善扁平足患者的舟骨下降、足部姿势和足底压力方面效果更佳。这意味着你在治疗扁平足时，可以考虑将肌内效贴作为足部运动的有效辅助手段。
items.titleZh: 足部特定运动结合或不结合肌内效贴对舟骨下降、足部姿势和足底压力的影响：一项随机比较试验
items.summaryZh: 一项针对 34 名扁平足年轻人的随机比较试验发现，足部特定运动结合肌内效贴在改善舟骨下降、足部姿势和足底压力方面优于单独运动。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT found that foot-specific exercise combined with taping was more effective than exercise alone in improving navicular drop, foot posture, and plantar pressure in flatfoot patients. This suggests you can consider taping as an effective adjunct to foot exercises when treating flatfoot.

items.title: Finding Voice: Experiences of Underrepresented Minority Faculty in Physical Therapist Education: A Qualitative Study.
items.summary: A qualitative study explored the experiences of underrepresented minority faculty in physical therapist education, highlighting challenges like additional unpaid responsibilities and marginalization.
items.curatedReason: 这项定性研究揭示了美国物理治疗师教育领域中少数族裔教师面临的挑战。作为学术型临床医师，你需要关注这些结构性障碍（如额外无偿责任、边缘化），以促进教育机构的多样性和包容性，确保物理治疗专业能够更好地代表和满足多元化社会的需求。
items.titleZh: 发出声音：物理治疗师教育领域中少数族裔教师的经历：一项定性研究
items.summaryZh: 一项定性研究探讨了物理治疗师教育领域中少数族裔教师的经历，强调了如额外无偿责任和边缘化等挑战。
items.curatedReasonEn: This qualitative study reveals challenges faced by underrepresented minority faculty in US physical therapist education. As an academic clinician, you need to address these structural barriers (e.g., unpaid responsibilities, marginalization) to promote diversity and inclusion in educational institutions, ensuring the PT profession better represents and serves a diverse society.

items.title: Impact of balneotherapy on drug consumption: a systematic review and an economic evaluation of drug deprescribing.
items.summary: A systematic review and economic evaluation explored the impact of balneotherapy on drug consumption, suggesting potential pharmacoeconomic savings due to decreased medication use.
items.curatedReason: 这项系统综述和经济学评估首次明确指出，温泉疗法（balneotherapy）可能通过减少药物使用来带来经济效益。虽然尚未深入到具体肌肉骨骼疾病的药物替代证据，但它为非药物干预的价值评估提供了一个新视角。
items.titleZh: 温泉疗法对药物消耗的影响：一项药物减量化系统综述及经济学评估
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述和经济学评估探讨了温泉疗法对药物消耗的影响，指出其可能通过减少药物使用而带来经济效益。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review and economic evaluation is the first to explicitly suggest balneotherapy may yield economic benefits by reducing drug consumption. While it doesn't delve into specific musculoskeletal conditions, it offers a novel perspective on valuing non-pharmacological interventions.

items.title: We Thought You'd Never Ask: Insights From the Health of Elite Retired Australian Female Athletes Survey.
items.summary: A survey of elite retired Australian female athletes provided insights into their long-term mental, brain, cardiovascular, musculoskeletal health, and general well-being post-retirement.
items.curatedReason: 这项针对澳大利亚精英退役女运动员的调查，首次系统性地描述了她们在退役后的心理、脑部、心血管和肌肉骨骼健康状况。这提醒你女性运动员在职业生涯后的独特健康需求，尤其是在肌肉骨骼健康方面，需要更专业的长期康复支持。
items.titleZh: “我们以为你们永远不会问”：澳大利亚精英退役女运动员健康调查的洞察
items.summaryZh: 一项针对澳大利亚精英退役女运动员的调查，揭示了她们退役后长期的心理、脑部、心血管、肌肉骨骼健康及整体福祉状况。
items.curatedReasonEn: This survey, the first systematic description of post-retirement health in elite Australian female athletes, highlights their unique mental, brain, cardiovascular, and musculoskeletal health needs. This indicates a demand for more specialized, long-term rehabilitation support for female athletes after their careers, especially concerning musculoskeletal health.

items.title: Measured and supervised physical exercise for older individuals with asthma, chronic obstructive pulmonary disease and obstructive sleep apnoea (MIOLI): protocol of a randomised controlled trial.
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial protocol, MIOLI, aims to evaluate the effects of measured and supervised physical exercise, specifically Nordic walking, for older individuals with asthma, COPD, and OSA.
items.curatedReason: 这项随机对照试验方案将探讨北欧式健走（Nordic Walking）对患有哮喘、COPD 和阻塞性睡眠呼吸暂停的老年人的具体影响。如果结果积极，北欧式健走可能成为老年心肺康复的有力补充，值得你关注其最终研究结果。
items.titleZh: 哮喘、COPD 和阻塞性睡眠呼吸暂停老年患者的测量和监督体育锻炼（MIOLI）：一项随机对照试验方案
items.summaryZh: MIOLI 是一项随机对照试验方案，旨在评估测量和监督下的体育锻炼（特别是北欧式健走）对患有哮喘、COPD 和阻塞性睡眠呼吸暂停的老年人的影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT protocol will investigate the specific impact of Nordic Walking on older adults with asthma, COPD, and obstructive sleep apnea. If results are positive, Nordic Walking could become a valuable adjunct in geriatric cardiopulmonary rehabilitation, so you should watch for the final study outcomes.

items.title: Prognostic value of distance-saturation product in COPD: Korean nationwide cohort study.
items.summary: A Korean nationwide cohort study confirmed the prognostic value of the distance-saturation product (6MWD x lowest oxygen saturation) in COPD, a composite marker of exercise capacity and gas exchange impairment.
items.curatedReason: 这项韩国全国队列研究证实了距离-饱和度乘积（DSP）作为 COPD 患者运动能力和气体交换受损复合指标的预后价值。DSP 的易得性使其成为你临床评估 COPD 患者预后的一个实用工具，特别是当你需要快速评估患者整体生理状况时。
items.titleZh: COPD 中距离-饱和度乘积的预后价值：一项韩国全国队列研究
items.summaryZh: 一项韩国全国队列研究证实了距离-饱和度乘积（6 分钟步行距离 x 最低血氧饱和度）作为 COPD 患者运动能力和气体交换受损复合指标的预后价值。
items.curatedReasonEn: This Korean nationwide cohort study confirms the prognostic value of the distance-saturation product (DSP) as a composite physiological marker for exercise capacity and gas exchange impairment in COPD patients. DSP's accessibility makes it a practical tool for your clinical assessment of COPD prognosis, especially when you need to quickly gauge a patient's overall physiological status.

items.title: Defining nonresponse to pulmonary rehabilitation by threshold scores for personality traits: a population-based study.
items.summary: A population-based study defined optimal threshold scores for personality traits associated with nonresponse to inpatient pulmonary rehabilitation, aiming to optimize tailoring of PR.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究深入探讨了人格特质与肺康复（PR）无反应之间的关联，并定义了最佳阈值分数。这意味着在筛选和定制 PR 方案时，你可以考虑患者的人格特质，这有助于识别可能需要额外支持或不同干预策略的患者，以提高 PR 的总体疗效。
items.titleZh: 通过人格特质阈值分数定义肺康复无反应者：一项基于人群的研究
items.summaryZh: 一项基于人群的研究定义了与住院肺康复无反应相关的人格特质最佳阈值分数，旨在优化肺康复的个性化定制。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study delves into the link between personality traits and nonresponse to pulmonary rehabilitation (PR), defining optimal threshold scores. This means you can consider personality traits when screening and tailoring PR programs, helping identify patients who may need extra support or different intervention strategies to improve overall PR effectiveness.

items.title: Holistic management of symptom burden in fibrosing interstitial lung diseases (F-ILDs).
items.summary: This review summarizes current evidence for the holistic management of symptom burden in fibrosing interstitial lung diseases (F-ILDs), emphasizing comprehensive supportive care alongside antifibrotic treatment.
items.curatedReason: 这篇综述强调了对于纤维化间质性肺疾病（F-ILDs）患者，除了抗纤维化治疗外，还需要全面的支持性护理来管理症状负担和改善生活质量。这明确了你在 F-ILDs 患者管理中的重要角色，包括呼吸训练、疲劳管理和功能维持等。
items.titleZh: 纤维化间质性肺疾病（F-ILDs）症状负担的整体管理
items.summaryZh: 这篇综述总结了纤维化间质性肺疾病（F-ILDs）症状负担整体管理的当前证据，强调了抗纤维化治疗之外全面支持性护理的重要性。
items.curatedReasonEn: This review emphasizes that patients with fibrosing interstitial lung diseases (F-ILDs) require comprehensive supportive care beyond antifibrotic treatments to manage symptom burden and improve quality of life. This clarifies your crucial role in F-ILDs patient management, encompassing respiratory training, fatigue management, and functional preservation.

items.title: Transforming chronic low back pain management in Bangladesh: implications for rehabilitation in low- and middle-income countries.
items.summary: A review explores transforming chronic low back pain management in Bangladesh, highlighting implications for rehabilitation in low- and middle-income countries facing high disease burden.
items.curatedReason: 这项综述揭示了孟加拉国慢性腰痛（CLBP）管理的挑战，及其对低收入和中等收入国家康复的启示。这提示你，在全球范围内推广循证康复实践时，必须考虑当地的社会文化背景、经济条件和医疗资源可及性，以确保干预措施的有效性和可持续性。
items.titleZh: 孟加拉国慢性腰痛管理转型：对中低收入国家康复的启示
items.summaryZh: 一篇综述探讨了孟加拉国慢性腰痛管理的转型，强调了其对面临高疾病负担的中低收入国家康复的启示。
items.curatedReasonEn: This review reveals challenges in chronic low back pain (CLBP) management in Bangladesh and its implications for rehabilitation in low- and middle-income countries. This indicates that when promoting evidence-based rehabilitation practices globally, you must consider local sociocultural contexts, economic conditions, and healthcare resource availability to ensure intervention effectiveness and sustainability.

items.title: Association Between Outpatient Physical Therapist Personality and Patient Management Outcomes: A Preliminary Study.
items.summary: A preliminary cross-sectional study examined if outpatient physical therapist personality traits are associated with patient management outcomes, finding potential insights for optimizing care.
items.curatedReason: 这项初步研究探讨了门诊物理治疗师（PT）的人格特质与患者管理结局之间的关联。它提示你，除了临床技能，PT 的人格特质也可能影响患者依从性和治疗效果，这对于团队建设和人才招聘有参考价值。
items.titleZh: 门诊物理治疗师人格特质与患者管理结局的关联：一项初步研究
items.summaryZh: 一项初步横断面研究探讨了门诊物理治疗师的人格特质是否与患者管理结局相关，为优化患者护理提供了潜在的见解。
items.curatedReasonEn: This preliminary study explores the association between outpatient physical therapist (PT) personality traits and patient management outcomes. It suggests that beyond clinical skills, a PT's personality might influence patient adherence and treatment effectiveness, which is valuable for team building and recruitment.

items.title: Retrospective analysis of guideline-based massage therapy in primary care for musculoskeletal disorders.
items.summary: A retrospective analysis explored guideline-based massage therapy in primary care for musculoskeletal disorders, aiming to assess its effectiveness given the existing controversies.
items.curatedReason: 这项回顾性分析探讨了初级保健中基于指南的按摩疗法对肌肉骨骼疾病的有效性。虽然按摩在某些情况下有益，但研究本身的回顾性设计和“缺乏确凿证据”的背景提示你，在推荐时仍需谨慎，并应结合其他循证干预。
items.titleZh: 初级保健中基于指南的按摩疗法治疗肌肉骨骼疾病的回顾性分析
items.summaryZh: 一项回顾性分析旨在评估初级保健中基于指南的按摩疗法治疗肌肉骨骼疾病的有效性，以解决其现有争议。
items.curatedReasonEn: This retrospective analysis explores the effectiveness of guideline-based massage therapy for musculoskeletal disorders in primary care. While massage may be beneficial in some cases, the retrospective design and the noted "lack of robust evidence" mean you should remain cautious in recommendations, integrating it with other evidence-based interventions.

items.title: Rethinking Health System Readiness for Frailty Management: Frontline Perspectives from Indonesia and Malaysia.
items.summary: A qualitative study from Indonesia and Malaysia explores frontline perspectives on health system readiness for frailty management, aligning with Sustainable Development Goals.
items.curatedReason: 这项来自印度尼西亚和马来西亚的研究提供了基层视角下应对虚弱管理的系统准备情况。它揭示了在低收入和中等收入国家，你需要面对的资源限制、文化差异和政策障碍，这对于你在全球康复服务发展或跨文化实践中提供服务具有重要参考意义。
items.titleZh: 重新思考医疗系统应对虚弱管理的准备情况：来自印度尼西亚和马来西亚的基层视角
items.summaryZh: 一项来自印度尼西亚和马来西亚的定性研究，探讨了基层对医疗系统应对虚弱管理的准备情况的看法，与可持续发展目标相符。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study from Indonesia and Malaysia offers frontline perspectives on health system readiness for frailty management. It reveals resource constraints, cultural differences, and policy barriers you'll encounter in low- and middle-income countries, which is crucial for delivering global rehabilitation services or engaging in cross-cultural practice.

items.title: A decline in skeletal muscle NOX4 abrogates exercise-induced adaptive homeostasis and exacerbates biological aging.
items.summary: A study found that a decline in skeletal muscle NOX4 abrogates exercise-induced adaptive homeostasis and exacerbates biological aging.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究揭示了骨骼肌 NOX4 水平随年龄下降与运动诱导适应性稳态减弱、生物衰老加剧的关联。虽然是基础研究，但它提示了未来通过调节 NOX4 来延缓肌肉衰老和改善老年人运动反应的潜在靶点，值得学术型临床医师关注。
items.titleZh: 骨骼肌 NOX4 下降削弱运动诱导的适应性稳态并加剧生物衰老
items.summaryZh: 一项研究发现，骨骼肌 NOX4 水平的下降会削弱运动诱导的适应性稳态，并加剧生物衰老。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study links declining skeletal muscle NOX4 levels with age to weakened exercise-induced adaptive homeostasis and exacerbated biological aging. While basic research, it suggests potential future targets, like NOX4 modulation, to slow muscle aging and improve exercise response in older adults, which academic clinicians should note.

items.title: Does resistance training make a difference to the quality of life or heart health for older adults compared to aerobic exercise? A systematic review protocol from The People's Review.
items.summary: A systematic review protocol from The People's Review will compare the effects of resistance training versus aerobic exercise on quality of life and heart health in older adults.
items.curatedReason: 这项系统综述方案将比较阻力训练与有氧运动对老年人生活质量和心脏健康的差异。虽然目前只是方案，但它触及了老年康复中常见的训练选择问题，最终结果将为你制定老年患者运动处方提供更清晰的证据。
items.titleZh: 阻力训练与有氧运动对老年人生活质量或心脏健康是否有差异？一项来自 The People's Review 的系统综述方案
items.summaryZh: The People's Review 的一项系统综述方案将比较阻力训练与有氧运动对老年人生活质量和心脏健康的影响差异。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review protocol will compare resistance training versus aerobic exercise for quality of life and heart health in older adults. While currently just a protocol, it addresses a common training choice in geriatric rehabilitation, and its eventual findings will offer clearer evidence for your exercise prescriptions for older patients.

items.title: The impacts of common chronic disease on autophagy and cellular stress during exertional heat stress in peripheral blood mononuclear cells of older males.
items.summary: A study investigated how common chronic diseases influence autophagy and cellular stress during exertional heat stress in peripheral blood mononuclear cells of older males.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究探讨了常见慢性病对老年男性在运动热应激期间细胞自噬和细胞应激的影响。虽然是基础生理学研究，但它提示你在设计老年患者，尤其是伴有慢性病的老年患者的运动方案时，需要更精细地考虑其生理应激反应和恢复能力。
items.titleZh: 常见慢性病对老年男性外周血单核细胞在运动热应激期间自噬和细胞应激的影响
items.summaryZh: 一项研究探讨了常见慢性病对老年男性外周血单核细胞在运动热应激期间自噬和细胞应激的影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study explores how common chronic diseases impact autophagy and cellular stress during exertional heat stress in older males. While it's foundational physiology, it suggests you need to consider physiological stress response and recovery capacity more carefully when designing exercise programs for older patients, especially those with chronic conditions.

items.title: Improving facial scar outcomes: an evidence-based update.
items.summary: An evidence-based update summarizes current prophylactic and therapeutic scar management techniques for facial scarring, covering various modalities including laser therapy.
items.curatedReason: 这篇综述总结了面部疤痕管理（包括激光疗法和放射疗法等）的最新证据。虽然主要面向耳鼻喉科医生，但其中关于疤痕愈合原则和多种物理治疗手段的讨论，对你在康复早期干预和后期疤痕功能恢复中同样具有参考价值。
items.titleZh: 改善面部疤痕效果：循证更新
items.summaryZh: 一篇基于证据的更新总结了面部疤痕预防和治疗的现有技术，涵盖了包括激光疗法在内的多种治疗方式。
items.curatedReasonEn: This review summarizes current evidence for facial scar management, including laser and radiation therapy. Although primarily for ENT surgeons, its discussions on scar healing principles and various physical therapy modalities are also valuable for your early intervention and later functional recovery in scar rehabilitation.

items.title: Radiofrequency for the treatment of pilonidal disease: results of a French prospective pilot study.
items.summary: A French prospective pilot study is the first to assess the safety, efficacy, and patient satisfaction of radiofrequency (RF) for pilonidal disease, showing positive early results.
items.curatedReason: 这项法国前瞻性初步研究首次评估了射频（RF）消融治疗藏毛病的安全性、有效性和患者满意度。虽然结果积极，但请记住这仍是初步数据，在临床推广前还需要更大规模、更严格的随机对照试验验证。
items.titleZh: 射频治疗藏毛病：一项法国前瞻性初步研究结果
items.summaryZh: 一项法国前瞻性初步研究首次评估了射频（RF）治疗藏毛病的安全性、有效性和患者满意度，显示出积极的早期结果。
items.curatedReasonEn: This French prospective pilot study is the first to evaluate the safety, efficacy, and patient satisfaction of radiofrequency (RF) ablation for pilonidal disease. While results are positive, remember this is preliminary data; larger, more rigorous RCTs are needed before widespread clinical adoption.

items.title: Orthopaedic Trauma Management in Developing Countries: A Narrative Review of Clinical Practices, Socioeconomic Challenges, and Healthcare Outcomes.
items.summary: A narrative review synthesizes evidence on orthopedic trauma management in developing countries, examining epidemiological patterns, clinical practices, and system-level constraints.
items.curatedReason: 这篇综述关注发展中国家骨科创伤管理面临的挑战。了解这些地区有限的医疗资源、社会经济障碍和高发创伤模式，有助于你在参与国际援助项目或了解全球康复需求时，更实际地评估干预措施的适用性和可持续性。
items.titleZh: 发展中国家骨科创伤管理：临床实践、社会经济挑战与医疗结局的叙述性综述
items.summaryZh: 一篇叙述性综述综合了发展中国家骨科创伤管理的证据，审查了流行病学模式、临床实践和系统层面的制约因素。
items.curatedReasonEn: This review focuses on orthopedic trauma management challenges in developing countries. Understanding the limited healthcare resources, socioeconomic barriers, and prevalent trauma patterns in these regions will help you realistically assess the applicability and sustainability of interventions when participating in international aid or understanding global rehabilitation needs.

items.title: [Correspondence] Minocycline for acute ischaemic stroke: limitations of the EMPHASIS trial
items.summary: A correspondence piece highlights several design features that temper confidence in the immediate generalizability of the EMPHASIS trial, which reported a modest increase in 90-day functional outcomes with minocycline for acute ischemic stroke.
items.curatedReason: 这篇评论指出了 EMPHASIS 试验中米诺环素治疗急性缺血性卒中在设计上的局限性。作为神经康复医师，你在考虑神经保护剂时，应警惕单一试验结果的普适性，并结合试验的详细设计缺陷，避免在临床实践中过度解读或推广。
items.titleZh: 米诺环素治疗急性缺血性卒中：EMPHASIS 试验的局限性
items.summaryZh: 一篇通讯文章指出，EMPHASIS 试验中米诺环素治疗急性缺血性卒中在设计上存在多处限制，使其 90 天功能结局的适度改善结果难以立即推广。
items.curatedReasonEn: This commentary highlights design limitations in the EMPHASIS trial of minocycline for acute ischemic stroke. As a neurorehabilitation clinician, when considering neuroprotective agents, you should be cautious about generalizing single trial results and avoid over-interpreting or over-promoting them in clinical practice, given the detailed design flaws.

items.title: Role of Prehabilitation in Improving Outcomes after Anterior Cruciate Ligament Reconstruction.
items.summary: Prehabilitation for ACL reconstruction is a rehabilitation program aimed at improving patient outcomes by addressing knee instability and loss of function prior to surgery, potentially reducing recovery delays.
items.curatedReason: ACL重建术前康复的证据等级仍在提升。这项前瞻性研究是评估术前干预对患者预后影响的又一积极信号，提示你应该在门诊流程中考虑更积极地整合术前康复方案，尤其关注减少术后恢复的延迟。
items.titleZh: ACL重建术前康复在改善预后中的作用
items.summaryZh: ACL重建术前康复旨在通过术前干预解决膝关节不稳定和功能丧失，可能减少术后恢复延迟，从而改善患者预后。
items.curatedReasonEn: The evidence for ACL prehabilitation continues to grow stronger. This prospective study is another positive signal for pre-surgical intervention, suggesting you should consider integrating more proactive prehabilitation protocols into your outpatient workflow, particularly to mitigate delayed post-op recovery.

items.title: Smartphone-Based Semi-Immersive Virtual Reality Enhances Upper Extremity Function in Subacute Stroke: A Randomized Controlled Trial.
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial (n=60) found that smartphone-based semi-immersive virtual reality, when augmented with conventional physical therapy, significantly improved upper extremity function in subacute stroke patients compared to conventional therapy alone.
items.curatedReason: 这项RCT证实，基于智能手机的半沉浸式VR能显著增强亚急性卒中患者的上肢功能。这是一项低成本且易于部署的技术，提示你应积极探索将其整合到常规物理治疗方案中，以提高任务特异性训练效果和神经可塑性。
items.titleZh: 基于智能手机的半沉浸式虚拟现实技术可增强亚急性卒中患者上肢功能：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照试验（n=60）发现，与单独进行常规物理治疗相比，结合智能手机半沉浸式虚拟现实技术能显著改善亚急性卒中患者的上肢功能。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT confirms that smartphone-based semi-immersive VR significantly enhances upper extremity function in subacute stroke patients. As a low-cost and easily deployable technology, you should actively explore integrating it into conventional physical therapy protocols to improve task-specific training and neuroplasticity.

items.title: Integrating neurocognitive strategies into rehabilitation after anterior cruciate ligament reconstruction: A clinical practice-oriented narrative review.
items.summary: This narrative review emphasizes integrating neurocognitive strategies into ACL reconstruction rehabilitation to address movement breakdowns in cognitively demanding sport environments, aiming for more consistent and successful return to sport.
items.curatedReason: ACL重建后运动员回归运动（RTS）失败率高，往往与认知功能障碍而非单纯力量不足有关。这篇综述提醒你，术后康复方案必须整合神经认知策略，解决决策、注意力、反应时间等问题，才能真正帮助运动员安全且高效地重返竞技场。
items.titleZh: 将神经认知策略整合到前交叉韧带重建术后康复中：一项以临床实践为导向的叙述性综述
items.summaryZh: 这篇叙述性综述强调将神经认知策略整合到前交叉韧带重建术后康复中，以解决认知要求高的运动环境中的运动障碍，旨在实现更稳定和成功的重返运动。
items.curatedReasonEn: High RTS failure rates after ACLR are often linked to neurocognitive deficits, not just strength. This review reminds you that post-operative rehab protocols must integrate neurocognitive strategies to address issues like decision-making, attention, and reaction time, truly helping athletes safely and effectively return to play.

items.title: Effectiveness of manual therapy on physical and mental health promotion in adults: a systematic review and meta-analysis.
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis found manual therapy to be effective in promoting physical and mental health in adults, relieving tension, improving circulation, and regulating physiological states across various conditions.
items.curatedReason: 这项系统综述和荟萃分析有力地证实了手法治疗在促进成人身心健康方面的有效性。它提供了高质量的证据，支持将手法治疗作为综合康复方案的重要组成部分，不仅用于缓解疼痛和运动障碍，还应拓展到更广泛的健康促进领域。
items.titleZh: 手法治疗在促进成人身心健康方面的有效性：一项系统综述和荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述和荟萃分析发现，手法治疗在促进成人身心健康方面有效，可缓解紧张、改善循环并调节各种病理生理状态。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review and meta-analysis powerfully confirms the effectiveness of manual therapy in promoting adult physical and mental health. It provides high-quality evidence supporting manual therapy as a crucial component of comprehensive rehabilitation protocols, not only for pain relief and movement disorders but also for broader health promotion.
